flatpak.reason: This recovery profile is intended to run without Bottles or Flatpak.

network_namespaces.reason: The generic OGV launcher declares host_default; strict network and device containment was validated separately.

ntsync.reason: The functional receipt does not independently persist the sync backend; the exact runner remains preserved.

python.reason: The generated OGV portable runtime is Python standard-library code.

user_namespaces.reason: The accepted functional Direct-Wine route did not use a user namespace.

vulkan.reason: The preserved prefix contains a DXVK-based configuration.

notes: Verified Direct-Wine recovery contract. Evidence is retained in 04_RECEIPTS/steam-570940-dark-souls-remastered-1.03.1/operations/set-dsr-playable-20260720T125946Z-3e66a15a/receipt.json. The accepted route covers direct launch, clean restoration, relocation, existing-save loading, video, audio, normal close, and separately validated strict containment. Controller support and cross-host portability remain limitations.
